properties.name: Mount Olympus
properties.summary: Mountain associated with the Olympian gods.
properties.quest: Ask why high places become sacred in storytelling.

properties.name: Delos
properties.summary: Island associated with Apollo and Artemis.
properties.quest: Connect myth, sanctuary and maritime networks.

properties.name: Ithaca
properties.summary: Island associated with Odysseus in epic tradition.
properties.quest: Ask how homecoming becomes a map story.

properties.name: Crete
properties.summary: Island connected with Minos, the Labyrinth and the Minotaur.

properties.name: Acheron River
properties.summary: River associated with underworld journeys in Greek tradition.

properties.name: Sparta
properties.summary: City associated with Helen, Menelaus and later Spartan history.
properties.quest: Compare mythic memory with political identity.

properties.name: Thebes
properties.summary: City associated with Cadmus, Oedipus and later Greek history.
properties.quest: Ask why tragic stories attach to particular cities.
